hindi: नमो नमो कमलपते, नमो नमो विश्वनाथ।
english: Salutations to the lord of the lotus, salutations to the lord of the universe
roman: Namo namo kamalapate namo namo Vishwanatha

hindi: नमो नमो लक्ष्मीरमण, नमो नमो पद्मनाभ॥
english: Salutations to the delight of Lakshmi, salutations to Padmanabha
roman: Namo namo Lakshmi ramana namo namo Padmanabha

english: Lotus-eyed, lotus-footed, born of the lotus, the Supreme
roman: Kamala nayana kamala pada kamalod bhava param

english: Beloved of Kamala (Lakshmi), Govinda — salutations to Kamalapati
roman: Kamala vallabha Govinda Kamalapati namo namah

english: Bearer of Shrivatsa, conch, discus and mace, O Hari
roman: Shrivatsa anka Shankha chakra gadadhara Hare

english: This Kamalapati Ashtakam — whoever reads it daily with reverence
roman: Kamalapati ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam adratah

english: Attains the gracious glance of Lakshmi and wealth and prosperity
roman: Lakshmi kataksha sampraaptim dhana sampattim apnuyat
